notes: Can refer to the vegetable (bell pepper) or the spice (paprika powder). The plural is often 'Paprika' or 'Paprikas'. The spice 'Paprika' is also used as an uncountable noun.

sentences.german: Ich schneide die Paprika in kleine Stücke für den Salat.
sentences.english: I am cutting the bell pepper into small pieces for the salad.

sentences.german: Sie würzt die Suppe mit einem Teelöffel Paprika.
sentences.english: She seasons the soup with a teaspoon of paprika.
